zh.lifeSummary: 當Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg於1163年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次維德易森波格時，他的父親Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg48歲，母親Irmgard Von Leiningen49歲。他於1210年與Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1228年在他的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在德國海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德海巴賀洛莫斯多福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg于1163年出生在海因里希_海普洛文次維德易森波格时，他的父亲Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg48岁，母亲Irmgard Von Leiningen49岁。他于1210年与Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1228年在他的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在德国海藍-普法爾茲藍德可萊斯 維德海巴賀洛莫斯多福。

nameMeanings.name: Isenburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of German or Jewish   Eisenberg  .
German: habitational name from the name of a medieval castle in the southern part of Hesse, the origin of a long line of nobility from the 12th century into the 21st century.

variants.name: Eisenberg
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Meyer, Moshe, Isadore, Akiva, Aron, Avner, Chaim, Emanuel, Isidor.
German: habitational name from any of several places so named, from Middle High German īsen ‘iron’ + berg ‘mountain, hill’.

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Limburg
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: habitational name from any of several places so named, the largest being in Hesse.

Dutch (also Van Limburg): habitational name for someone from the province of Limburg or from several places so named, like Limburg in the Belgian province of Liège or from Limbourg in Haut-Rhin, France, all named with the ancient Germanic elements lindo ‘lime tree’ or ‘dragon’ + burg ‘fortified place’.

nameMeanings.name: Heinrich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Henry
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg was born in 1163, in Isenburg, Neuwied, Rhineland, Prussia, his father, Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg, was 48 and his mother, Irmgard Von Leiningen, was 49. He married Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle in 1210. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1228, in his hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Rommersdorf, Heimbach, Neuwied, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg est né en 1163, à Isenburg, Neuwied, Rhénanie, Prusse, son père, Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Irmgard Von Leiningen, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle en 1210. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1228, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Rommersdorf, Heimbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg 1163 in Isenburg, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg 48 und seine Mutter Irmgard Von Leiningen 49. Er hat 1210 Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1228 im Alter von 65 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Rommersdorf, Heimbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg è nato il nel 1163 nel Isenburg, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, il suo padre, Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Irmgard Von Leiningen, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle nel 1210. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1228, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Rommersdorf, Heimbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburgが1163年にプレウssンルヘインプロヴィンズネウウィエドイセンブルグで生まれた時，父Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburgは48歳，母Irmgard Von Leiningenは49歳であった。1210年にIrmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1228年に故郷で65歳で死去し，ドイツルヘインランド-プファルズランドクレイス ネウウィエドヘインバチロンメルスドルフにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg(이)가 1163년 프레우ss 리인프로빈츠 니우위드 이센버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Irmgard Von Leiningen(은)는 49세였다. 그는 1210년 Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1228년 그의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 리인랜드-p팔즈 랜드크레이스 니우위드 하임바치 롬머즈도르프에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg nasceu em 1163, em Isenburg, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, seu pai, Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Irmgard Von Leiningen, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle em 1210. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1228, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Rommersdorf, Heimbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg родился в 1163 г. в местности исенбург, неувиед, раинпровинз, Пруссия, его отцу по имени Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Irmgard Von Leiningen, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle в 1210 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1228 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности роммирсдорф, химбач, ландкрис неувиед, раинланд-пфалз, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Heinrich I Isenburg von Limburg nació en 1163, en Isenburg, Neuwied, Rheinprovinz, Preußen, su papá, Gerlach IV Isenburg von Limburg, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Irmgard Von Leiningen, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Irmgard von Kleeberg und von Mörle en 1210. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1228, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Rommersdorf, Heimbach, Landkreis Neuwied, Rheinland-Pfalz, Alemania.
